name: Floret
description: WORK IN PROGRESS (FLORET.2a stub) — a faithful port of the Milkdrop preset `suksma - Rovastar - Sunflower Passion (Enlightment Mix)`: a breathing 3-fold radial fractal bloom on a near-black ground (a 1/r² vortex swirl + z² conformal fold blooming colour-cycling seed-discs into iridescent cells), on Phosphene's mv_warp with HDR float feedback. The faithful base + audio coupling + uplifts land at FLORET.2b/.3; this stub only wires the custom warp+comp branch test-reachably. certified:false until FLORET.4. See docs/presets/FLORET_PLAN.md.
author: Matt
